content: Overlay-label popup hardening slice: user observed that label selection worked but the click popup did not appear. Fixed popup activation to run in capture phase and stop competing click handlers, so inspector/selection/abstraction listeners cannot consume the label click first. Added SVG group anchor fallback that positions popups from child bounds when a trigger group reports a zero rect, covering Safari-style SVG <g> behavior. Added docs/aof/OVERLAY-POPUP-QIF-CHECK-2026-07-11.md with QIF quality/intent/risk decision. Verification: npm test -- test/interaction.test.ts (9 passing); npx tsc --noEmit; npm test (233 passing); npm run build. Vite was restarted and reports ready on http://127.0.0.1:5173/ for manual browser verification; sandbox curl could not connect across the local namespace. Existing untracked reports/ remains untouched.
